title: Per-command docs in docs/
goal: Create detailed per-command documentation under docs/, split into docs/interactive/ (the /mini:* slash commands) and docs/non-interactive/ (the mini * CLI commands), one markdown page per user-facing command mirroring miniorchestrator.com/en/docs. Each page has description, usage/flags, worked examples with sample output, edge-case notes and links to related commands. Covered commands: init, next, discuss, plan, do, verify, done, auto, status, undo, model, todo, changelog, doctor, map, audit, upgrade (both variants), plus mini stop which has a single page under non-interactive/ (console-only, no slash variant). README cross-linking comes in a later phase.

steps.title: Scaffold docs dirs + index page
steps.detail: Create docs/interactive/ and docs/non-interactive/ dirs and docs/README.md as a navigation index grouped like the website (Project setup / Phase loop / Autonomous / State & control), linking every command page.

steps.title: Non-interactive CLI command pages
steps.detail: Write docs/non-interactive/<cmd>.md for all user-facing CLI commands plus stop (init, next, discuss, plan, do, verify, done, auto, status, undo, model, todo, changelog, doctor, map, audit, upgrade, stop). Each: description, usage/flags, worked examples with sample output, edge-case notes, links.

steps.title: Interactive slash command pages
steps.detail: Write docs/interactive/<cmd>.md for the 17 /mini:* slash commands (no stop). Each: description, how it behaves in a Claude Code session, examples, links to related commands and the CLI sibling.

steps.title: Cross-linking and consistency pass
steps.detail: Every page links to its sibling variant and related commands; verify all index and inter-page links resolve and formatting is consistent across pages.
